expectations.text: Two separate Agent instances defined at module level

expectations.text: Agents use different model identifiers (e.g. gpt-5.2 vs gpt-5-mini or similar cost split)
Main agent has a @agent.tool that calls the research agent via await research_agent.run()
Delegation passes usage=ctx.usage for token tracking aggregation
Report BaseModel defined with title (str), findings (list[str]), and summary (str) fields
